issues.description: Missing condition for DON!! cost payment. The effect requires 'DON!! −1' (return 1 DON!! card from field to DON!! deck) as a cost/condition before playing the card. DSL must include condition to check HasAttachedDon or similar, and an action to detach/remove the DON!!.
PlayFromHand should include 'optional':true since text says 'You may'. Currently missing this modifier.
